41964604.title: List of people named Peter
41964604.extract: Peter, Peder, Péter or Petr is a common name. As a given name, it is generally derived from Peter the Apostle who has originally been called Simon, but gained his new name after declaring Jesus to indeed be the Messiah The name "Peter" roughly means "rock" in Greek.

categories.title: Category:Lists of people by given name
